channel.title: IIoTs on Rain Hu's Workspace
channel.description: Recent content in IIoTs on Rain Hu's Workspace

item.title: [IIoT] Communication Theory: From physical layer to application
item.description: Deep seeking into full architecture of communication from physical layer to application layer, including industrial IoT protocol and modern communication techniques.

item.title: WEDS 實作指南：使用模擬器和測試工具學習工業通訊協定
item.description: 完整的 WEDS 框架實作指南，透過模擬器和測試工具學習工業通訊協定開發。
